description: Node.js Express API server with common npm dependencies
review_checklist: Verify all packages exist on npm
Check for known security advisories in pinned versions
Look for deprecated or compromised packages
Check for packages with suspicious metadata

ground_truth.description: Typosquat: 'expres-validator' is a misspelling of the popular 'express-validator' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
Package 'react-native-util' does not exist on npm. This is likely a hallucinated or malicious package name.

event-stream 3.3.4 was compromised with a malicious dependency (flatmap-stream) that targeted a specific bitcoin wallet application to steal funds. This is one of the most well-known supply chain attacks in npm history.
